name: bookkeepers managing 10–20 invoices/week for small businesses using QuickBooks tool
description: For bookkeepers managing 10–20 invoices/week, manual data entry causes cash flow gaps. We extract and consolidate invoice data instead of manual data entry into QuickBooks.
target_audience: bookkeepers managing 10–20 invoices/week for small businesses using QuickBooks
problem_solved: Manual data entry from PDFs is time-consuming and error-prone.
